commit_msg: docs(todo): expand roadmap with cinematic release cut pipeline
author: Omkar
title: CASE FILE — The Confession Written in Markdown
subtitle: Thirteen minutes later, he documented the crime in perfect syntax.
when_where: 🌆 12:32 PM, still main, still daylight, still the same terminal window. But now the roadmap lay open like a ledger—every future crime catalogued in bullet points and nested lists. 📋 The TODO file was no longer a plan; it was a blueprint for obsession, and he was writing it down so nobody could say they weren't warned.
who_whom: 🖊️ He was documenting not for the team, but for the record—for the eventual investigation that would follow. The cinematic release cut pipeline wasn't a feature request; it was a confession disguised as product vision. 🎬 Every expanded line in that roadmap was a breadcrumb leading back to him, and he was laying them out voluntarily.
what_why: 📝 The docs expanded with surgical precision: BGM integration, storyboard sequences, casefile markdown, render profiles—a full production pipeline hiding inside a technical roadmap. 🧠 By documenting it, he made it real. By making it real, he made it impossible to deny. 💀 The confession was the crime. The crime was that he wanted someone to find it.
verdict: He didn't expand the roadmap; he expanded his own confession.
